title: 30g Star Confetti Blue Star Table Confetti, 6mm Metallic Glitter Foil Sprinkles Confetti, Sequins Star Confetti for Birthday Wedding Party Halloween Christmas Decoration
features: 【Package Quantity】about 6000 pieces birthday star table confetti per pack, which are enough quantity for you to use, glitter blue star confetti is perfect for birthday party, wedding decorations.

【Star Confetti Decorations】 The blue star confetti is perfect for birthday wedding Halloween Christmas party. They are high quality, durable and reusable. You can adorn your occasions according to your own preference, bright blue is more noble and romantic.

【Wide Use】The sequins star confetti can be applied for table decoration, gift bag wrapping, DIY craft, greeting card, invitation card and so on. You can spread them on the table or anywhere you want to decorate, you can also use tape to attach them to wall or windows for fun.

【Warm Tips】The star sequins confetti is small size, so it may cause swallowing mistakenly. Please keep the confetti far away from kids. Not recommended for children under the age of six. Please use under adult supervision.
【High Quality Service】We aim to provide 100% customer satisfaction to our customers. Please contact us if there is any problems, we provide a full-refund or hassle-free replacement service.
description: Product description Features: Sprinkle the star confetti on the table to add a little sparkle, beautiful and shiny, creating party atmosphere.
